title: Electronic Arts Catches a Downgrade. Microsoft's Activision Deal Is Why.
text: BMO Capital Markets lowered its rating of the videogame publisher to Market Perform from Outperform.

title: EA's stock catches downgrade as blocked Microsoft deal for Activision eliminates ‘takeout premium'
text: The blocking of Microsoft Corp.'s acquisition of Activision Blizzard Inc. by U.K. regulators has thrown cold water on any potential large deals in the videogame space, prompting one analyst to downgrade shares of Electronic Arts Inc.

title: Can Videogame Makers Overcome the Lean Patch in Sales?
text: All major videogame makers like Microsoft Corporation (MSFT), Sony Corporation (SONY) and Electronic Arts (EA) and Activision Blizzard (ATVI) are trying to bounce back from their recent lows.

title: 3 Gaming Stocks with Big Upside Potential
text: Gaming stocks have taken center stage with the evolution of gaming from a niche hobby to a mainstream phenomenon. With impressive price tags attached to video games, it's no wonder investors are always on the lookout for the best gaming stocks with huge growth potential.

title: The Sims™ 4 Becomes the Most Widely Played Game in the 23 Year History of the Franchise With More Than 70 Million Players Worldwide
text: REDWOOD CITY, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Maxis™, a studio of Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ:EA) shares today that The Sims™ 4, the latest iteration of the popular life simulation game and the most widely played game in the 23-year history of The Sims franchise, now reaches more than 70 million players around the world.

title: ESE Produces Two Live LAN Finals for Riot Games' League of Legends and Electronic Arts' FIFA23
text: VANCOUVER, BC / ACCESSWIRE / April 18, 2023 / ESE Entertainment Inc. ("ESE" or the "Company") (TSXV:ESE) (OTCQX:ENTEF) is pleased to announce the successful production of live esports events for the Ultraliga (League of Legends) and PKO BP Ekstraklasa Games (Electronic Arts (NASDAQ: EA) FIFA23) finals, delivered by its media production division, FRENZY sp. z.o.o. ("FRENZY").

title: The 7 Best Growth Stocks to Buy in the Gaming Sector
text: Video games continue to be red hot. Driven by constantly improving technology and a steady stream of imaginative titles, global sales of video games are forecast to reach $221.40 billion this year, according to market research firm Statista.

title: Electronic Arts (EA) Reveals Immortals of Aveum Slated for July
text: Electronic Arts (EA) and Ascendant Studios announce that Immortals of Aveum, a groundbreaking single-player and first-person magic shooter, is set to release on Jul 20, 2023.

title: ‘Immortals Of Aveum' Is A New Magic-Based First-Person Shooter From EA And It Looks Surprisingly Great
text: Immortals of Aveum combines the fast-paced shooting of Call Of Duty with spellcasting battlemages. It looks great!

title: EA and Ascendant Studios Unveil Immortals of Aveum™, an All-New Single Player Magic Shooter Launching July 20, 2023
text: REDWOOD CITY, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA) and Ascendant Studios announced that Immortals of Aveum™, a groundbreaking single-player, first-person magic shooter, will be released on July 20, 2023 on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S and PC via EA App, Steam and Epic Games Store.

title: Introducing EA SPORTS FC™ FUTURES – A Plan To Invest $10M Globally to Grow Community Football
text: LONDON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA) announced FC FUTURES; a plan to meaningfully invest in community-level football on a global scale with the purpose of growing the game for all.

title: Electronic Arts: High Quality Revenue Model
text: Electronic Arts Inc. is a global company that creates, markets and publishes games. EA has done a fantastic job of monetizing its IP, allowing the business to generate outsized returns through recurring revenue.
